ip_outcome_note: Confirmed via card name 'Iron Wall Magetta', card trait 'Metalman / Alien', Champa Saga era tag, and Dragon Ball Official Site Character Showcase no. 188 (Otta Magetta). The depicted mechanical figure with dome head, magma-body physiology, and defensive stance matches canonical Metalman description exactly.

trivia_bullets.text: Iron Wall Magetta (BT1-020) is an Uncommon from Galactic Battle (BT1), the inaugural main set of the Dragon Ball Super Card Game, released July 28, 2017. The set launched with 114 cards and introduced the Champa Saga / Universe 6 Saga as its primary narrative frame.
sources: PSA CardFacts: 2017 Dragon Ball Z Super Series 1 Galactic Battle
The Games Corner AU: Galactic Battle Special Pack Set listing

trivia_bullets.text: Magetta is a Metalman from Galactic System 66,950 in Universe 6. Despite appearing robotic, Metalmen are a biological race whose bodies are filled with magma; when Magetta is under stress a steam pipe atop his head vents heat — a literal physiological tell.
sources: Dragon Ball Official Site, Showcase no. 188: Otta Magetta

trivia_bullets.text: The card skill reads 'This card cannot be KO-ed in battle,' a direct translation of Magetta's anime trait: his metal body absorbed Super Saiyan Vegeta's Full Power Final Flash without being knocked out. Card trait listed as 'Alien', era 'Champa Saga', color Red, 15000 power, energy cost 3.
sources: Dragon Ball Wiki: Auta Magetta (via WebSearch)

trivia_bullets.text: Magetta's sole exploitable flaw is emotional: the entire Metalman race loses the will to fight when insulted. Vegeta won their Tournament of Destroyers bout by calling him a 'pathetic pile of junk', causing Magetta to cry and stop fighting. The card name 'Iron Wall' contrasts sharply with this fragility.
sources: Dragon Ball Official Site, Showcase no. 188: Otta Magetta
Dragon Ball Wiki: Auta Magetta (via WebSearch)

trivia_bullets.text: Magetta was selected by Vados for Universe 6's five-fighter team alongside Hit, Cabba, Frost, and Botamo. He famously passed the required written exam with exactly 50%.
sources: Dragon Ball Wiki: Auta Magetta / Universe 6 Saga (via WebSearch)

related_cards.name: Hit
related_cards.note: Universe 6 teammate; marquee card of the set

related_cards.name: Cabba
related_cards.note: Fellow Universe 6 tournament representative; in BBL corpus

related_cards.name: Frost
related_cards.note: Universe 6 fighter; cheated against Goku and Piccolo in same arc

related_cards.name: Botamo
related_cards.note: Universe 6 fighter; preceded Magetta's bout against Vegeta

related_cards.name: Vados
related_cards.note: Universe 6 angel who selected the team including Magetta
